title: Zombie Tactics
description: An overhaul of zombie AI, which allows them to break blocks and improves their tracking.
body:
### Warning! Zombie Tactics makes significant changes to zombie AI, and thus, may be wholly incompatible with other AI-changing mods.

The features listed bellow can all be toggled and configured in the config file.

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>


<details>
<summary>Mining</summary>
  
When zombies are done or stuck during navigation, they can attempt to break blocks between them and their target, whether a block can be broken depends on its hardness being lower than the maximal hardness set in the config file.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Climbing</summary>
  
When multiple zombies collide they can push each other up with a set velocity which can be changed in the config file.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Targeting</summary>

Zombies will target animals (entities which extend ```Animal```)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Markers</summary>

Entities that take damage, use items, or are projectiles hitting a target or surface, will spawn markers which will attract nearby zombies.

</details>



</details>

Updating to a new major version usually requires the config to be regenerated.
